query:
-- FMCSA cache fields on companies table
ALTER TABLE companies
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fmcsaVerifiedAt BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fmcsaSafetyRating VARCHAR(64),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fmcsaAuthorityStatus VARCHAR(64),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fmcsaInsuranceOnFile TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fmcsaOutOfServicePct DECIMAL(5,2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fmcsaOperatingStatus VARCHAR(64),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fmcsaEntityType VARCHAR(64),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fmcsaRawData JSON;

-- Customer Portal tables
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS portal_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  token VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  contactId INT,
  dealId INT,
  label VARCHAR(256),
  expiresAt BIGINT,
  lastAccessedAt BIGINT,
  accessCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  isActive TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS portal_comments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  portalTokenId INT NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  authorType ENUM('contact','owner') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'contact',
  authorName VARCHAR(256),
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS portal_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  portalTokenId INT NOT NULL,
  fileName VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  fileUrl VARCHAR(1024) NOT NULL,
  fileKey VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  mimeType VARCHAR(128),
  fileSize INT,
  uploadedBy ENUM('contact','owner') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'contact',
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

-- Two-Way Email Sync tables
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_sync_accounts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  provider ENUM('gmail','outlook') NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  esaAccessToken TEXT,
  esaRefreshToken TEXT,
  esaTokenExpiresAt BIGINT,
  syncEnabled TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  lastSyncedAt BIGINT,
  syncStatus VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'idle',
  errorMessage TEXT,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_sync_messages (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  accountId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  contactId INT,
  companyId INT,
  messageId VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  threadId VARCHAR(512),
  subject VARCHAR(1024),
  fromAddress VARCHAR(320),
  toAddresses JSON,
  ccAddresses JSON,
  bodyText TEXT,
  bodyHtml TEXT,
  direction ENUM('inbound','outbound') NOT NULL,
  sentAt BIGINT,
  isRead TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  hasAttachments TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  labels JSON,
  syncedAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute
